meaning: symb [化]铒 (erbium)  (英国)伊丽莎白女王 ER(Queen Elizabeth)
examples: People that are addicted to drugs get, er, help from the government one way or another.
Er, close the door, will you?
Male Chorus: (Singing) It was a lover and his lass, that o'er the green cornfield did pass.
In return these patients will begin to use the ER as their primary physician.
